subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Mwanamukazhi ne mwanamulume ba jifumbi
topics: jimo, kechi bafikilamo kwisongola ine, mambo
baanabakazhi bakoma bukiji mu maana ne mu
Bafwainwa kwisongola mambo bonse baji mu
jifumbi jimo kabiji ne maana kechi apusenshatu
